extract: Moonview Arena (Japanese: 迎月の戦場 Moon-Welcoming Battlefield) is an area located in the western region of the Coronet Highlands of Hisui. It is located west of the Sacred Plaza. It is the place where the noble Electrode, Lord of the Hollow (Japanese: 洞窟キング King of the Cave), resides. Electrode is fought here as part of Mission 11: "Scaling Perilous Heights" to calm him of his frenzy. The Summit Camp is established between the entrance of the arena and the Sacred Plaza during Mission 17: "Atop Mount Coronet". Warden Melli of the Diamond Clan tends to Electrode here. The player can find the Legendary Pokémon Cresselia here as part of Request 23: "The Plate of Moonview Arena".
